title.en: China-to-Cameroon Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入喀麦隆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入喀麥隆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Cameroon ANOR/PECAE pre-shipment conformity requirements, ARSEL grid-connection licensing, ENEO / SONATREL network connection specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and donor/lender (AfDB, World Bank) procurement technical specifications — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与喀麦隆ANOR/PECAE装运前合格评定要求、ARSEL并网许可、ENEO/SONATREL电网接入规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及捐助方/贷款方（非洲开发银行、世界银行）采购技术规格——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與喀麥隆ANOR/PECAE裝運前合格評定要求、ARSEL併網許可、ENEO/SONATREL電網接入規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及捐助方/貸款方（非洲開發銀行、世界銀行）採購技術規格——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ANOR conformity scope determination, PECAE pre-shipment inspection approval, ARSEL licensing decision, ENEO or SONATREL grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Cameroon ANOR Technical Regulations, PECAE programme requirements, ARSEL sector regulations, ENEO and SONATREL grid-connection technical specifications, AER rural electrification programme rules, and donor/lender procurement specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ANOR合格评定范围裁定、PECAE装运前检验批准、ARSEL许可决定、ENEO或SONATREL并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行喀麦隆ANOR技术法规、PECAE计划要求、ARSEL行业法规、ENEO和SONATREL并网技术规格、AER农村电气化计划规则及捐助方/贷款方采购规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ANOR合格評定範圍裁定、PECAE裝運前檢驗批准、ARSEL許可決定、ENEO或SONATREL併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆ANOR技術法規、PECAE計畫要求、ARSEL行業法規、ENEO和SONATREL併網技術規格、AER農村電氣化計畫規則及捐助方/貸款方採購規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Cameroon, the key practical gates are: (1) ANOR PECAE pre-shipment conformity assessment — Cameroon's Programme d'Évaluation de la Conformité Avant Embarquement requires a Certificate of Conformity before export, with IEC-based technical evidence; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory — Chinese GB/T 37408 is not accepted as equivalent; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance validated for Cameroon's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — distinct from China's 220/380 V baseline; (4) IEC 62920 EMC evidence, which Chinese GB/T certificates do not substitute; (5) ARSEL sector licensing for grid-tied installations; (6) ENEO grid-connection approval for distribution-level projects; and (7) donor/lender (AfDB, World Bank, EU) procurement technical specifications for publicly financed solar and mini-grid projects, which commonly mandate IEC certification and may specify ILAC-accredited test reports. China GB/T 37408-2021 and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines do not satisfy any of these Cameroon-side requirements without supplementary IEC evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口喀麦隆时，主要实际门槛包括：（1）ANOR PECAE装运前合格评定——喀麦隆《装运前合格评定计划》（PECAE）要求在出口前提交合格证书，须附IEC技术证据；（2）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据——中国GB/T 37408不被接受为等效依据；（3）针对喀麦隆230/400 V、50 Hz电网验证的IEC 62116防孤岛合规——与中国220/380 V基准有所区别；（4）IEC 62920 EMC证据，中国GB/T证书不可替代；（5）并网装置须取得ARSEL行业许可；（6）配电层面项目须取得ENEO并网批准；（7）公共财政支持的太阳能及微电网项目须符合捐助方/贷款方（非洲开发银行、世界银行、欧盟）采购技术规格，通常要求IEC认证并可能指定ILAC认可测试报告。中国GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基准在没有补充IEC证据的情况下，不满足上述任何喀麦隆侧要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口喀麥隆時，主要實際門檻包括：（1）ANOR PECAE裝運前合格評定——喀麥隆《裝運前合格評定計畫》（PECAE）要求在出口前提交合格證書，須附IEC技術證據；（2）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據——中國GB/T 37408不被接受為等效依據；（3）針對喀麥隆230/400 V、50 Hz電網驗證的IEC 62116防孤島合規——與中國220/380 V基準有所區別；（4）IEC 62920 EMC證據，中國GB/T證書不可替代；（5）併網裝置須取得ARSEL行業許可；（6）配電層面項目須取得ENEO併網批准；（7）公共財政支持的太陽能及微電網項目須符合捐助方/貸款方（非洲開發銀行、世界銀行、歐盟）採購技術規格，通常要求IEC認證並可能指定ILAC認可測試報告。中國GB/T 37408-2021和GB/T 19964-2024基準在沒有補充IEC證據的情況下，不滿足上述任何喀麥隆側要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
